settings.themeDescription: Adjust the workspace appearance to reduce eye strain or match your lighting environment.
settings.storageDescription: Review files uploaded from chat and remove files you no longer need.
settings.storageManageDescription: Select one or more uploaded files, then delete them from your personal storage.
settings.storageSomeMissing: Some selected files were already removed.
settings.passwordDescription: Last updated 14 days ago. Enable 2FA for better security.
settings.clearChatDescription: Permanently delete all your conversation data across the system.
settings.confirmClearDescription: This will permanently delete all of your conversations and messages. This action cannot be undone.
settings.deleteAccountDescription: Permanently remove your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
settings.confirmDeleteDescription: This will permanently remove your account and all associated data. You will be signed out immediately.
settings.signOutDescription: End your current session and securely log out of the interface.
settings.confirmSignOutDescription: Your current session will be ended. Theme and language preferences will stay on this device.
